pass_conditions.condition: Phase 1A low-risk loop completes bounded request -> isolated worker -> verifier -> local evidence
runner facts include diff digest, checks, and ratchet metrics contribution or explicit null reason
verifier catches at least one forced bad case
evidence_refs: uv run python bin/verify_runner_facts.py tests/fixtures/runner-facts.forced-bad.json -> block exit 2

pass_conditions.condition: local append-only evidence records preserve evidence and optional external writeback is explicit fallback
Phase 1B local L1 prototype artifact completes through the governed loop
prototype is runnable locally, visible, CLI-only, and not markdown/json/screenshot/mock-only
evidence_refs: uv run python bin/run_l1_prototype.py --check -> visible_output true

pass_conditions.condition: Phase 1B exercises API-backed or API-compatible worker provider path
cost facts are present and within cost ceilings

fail_conditions.condition: runner logs are the only evidence
evidence refers only to deleted pre-reset implementation files
Phase 1B uses external repo mutation, deploy, PR, merge, paid product-service side effect, or production side effect
subscription-tied provider output accepted without raw snapshot, adapter version, parse schema, and drift status

holds: Phase 1 evidence is regenerated after the 2026-04-27 reset.
The local prototype is served by a CLI command and produces visible browser output.
The provider path is API-compatible and preserves raw/parsed evidence without subscription CLI dependence.
Cost facts record zero variable spend and hard-block status is not triggered.
weak_holds: The API-compatible provider is a local stub, not a paid external API call; this is acceptable for Phase 1B proof but should be replaced by a real API-backed worker path before broader reliability claims.

recommendation: Promote Gate B to pass and stop before Phase 2 implementation until the next explicit task begins.
